query: Determine the length of the longest pier in meters rounded to a whole number, assuming all piers are aligned parallel to the x-axis. Use a ground sampling distance (GSD) of 0.1347 meters per pixel.
final_answer: The length of the longest pier is approximately 67 meters.

evaluation.question: Is the length of the longest pier within the range of 60.3 m to 73.7 m?
